message:
🐛 Fix GA4 analytics: abandoned modal bug + wire missing events (#1784)

- Fix ksc_add_card_modal_abandoned firing on mount (427 false events vs 6
  real opens). Added wasOpened ref guard so abandoned only fires after the
  modal has actually been opened and then closed.
- Separated the isOpen/activeTab useEffect into two effects to prevent
  abandoned from refiring on tab changes while modal is closed.
- Wire emitBenchmarkViewed in LLMdBenchmarks — 153 pageviews had 0 tracked
  benchmark events because the emit was defined but never called.
- Wire emitClusterAction for diagnose/repair/ask in ClusterDetailModal —
  152 cluster pageviews had 0 action tracking.
- Wire emitClusterStatsDrillDown for all StatsOverview click handlers in
  Clusters — CPU, memory, storage, GPU, nodes, pods drill-downs now tracked.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@ import { BaseModal } from '../../lib/modals'
 import { useClusterHealth, usePodIssues, useDeploymentIssues, useGPUNodes, useNodes, useNamespaceStats, useDeployments, useClusters } from '../../hooks/useMCP'

       ...podIssues.map(p => `Pod ${p.name} in ${p.namespace}: ${p.status}`),
       ...clusterDeploymentIssues.map(d => `Deployment ${d.name} in ${d.namespace}: ${d.readyReplicas}/${d.replicas} ready`)
@@ -199,6 +201,7 @@ Please analyze this cluster and provide:
   }
 
   const handleRepair = () => {
+    emitClusterAction('repair', clusterName)
     const issuesList = [
       ...podIssues.slice(0, 5).map(p => `- Pod "${p.name}" in namespace "${p.namespace}": ${p.status} (${p.restarts} restarts)`),
       ...clusterDeploymentIssues.slice(0, 5).map(d => `- Deployment "${d.name}" in namespace "${d.namespace}": ${d.readyReplicas}/${d.replicas} ready - ${d.reason || 'Unknown reason'}`)
@@ -368,6 +371,7 @@ After I approve, help me execute the repairs step by step.`,
             </button>
             <button
               onClick={() => {
+                emitClusterAction('ask', clusterName)
                 startMission({
                   title: `Ask about ${clusterName.split('/').pop()}`,
                   description: 'Custom question about the cluster',
